meta.note: Curated inputs for the KB research-refresh job. URLs are fetched and fed to the synthesis engine; topics guide what to look for. Add Spark/GB10-specific, high-signal sources.

sources.note: NVIDIA DGX Spark developer forum thread

topics: vLLM/SGLang configs that work on GB10 (sm_121): MoE backend, quantization (NVFP4/FP8/MXFP4), CUDA graphs, speculative decoding (MTP), gpu-memory-utilization
New Spark-optimized models and their measured tok/s (single-stream and batched)
Known GB10 pitfalls: kernel/backend rejections, arm64 image requirements, NVFP4-vs-FP8 regressions
Emerging community Docker images and recommended flags
